title: The M6800D from AudioControl
bodyHtml:
The M6800D from AudioControl

If you’ve ever wondered how to enjoy consistent, high-fidelity sound across your entire home—from the living room to the patio—the AudioControl M6800D offers a powerful answer.

This 16-channel amplifier can manage up to eight separate zones of audio, delivering rich, room-filling power with the kind of control and clarity most amplifiers can’t match.

‍

‍

Built for the Modern Home

With 100 watts of power per channel at 8 ohms—and up to 200 watts at 4 ohms—the M6800D can drive an impressive range of speakers, including large in-wall systems like the James Loudspeaker QX620 or Triad’s Gold Series, even when installed in outdoor or high-ceiling spaces. When paired with the right speakers, you’ll hear every detail from your favorite playlists, whether you're hosting in the kitchen or relaxing outside.

It’s not just about power, though. This amplifier includes an onboard digital signal processor that allows each room—or zone—to be tuned independently. That means your kitchen audio can be crisp and bright while your theater room delivers deep, cinematic bass.

‍

‍

More Than an Amplifier

The M6800D is more than just amplification. It includes matrix switching that lets you send any audio source to any room in the house. Whether it’s a streaming playlist, a turntable, or the audio from your TV, you can route the sound to one or multiple zones with zero loss in quality.

Thanks to its built-in Dante audio networking, you’re not limited by wiring. Digital audio can be distributed over your home’s Ethernet network, enabling clean installations and future-ready flexibility. For homeowners with large spaces or plans to expand, that level of scalability becomes a real advantage.

‍

‍

Smarter Sound Management

With the ability to configure equalization, set crossover points, and store speaker profiles from top loudspeaker brands, the M6800D gives you a tailored experience. These profiles help optimize the sound for your exact speakers, reducing guesswork and enhancing clarity. Even if your home has tricky acoustics, the amplifier’s fine-tuning capabilities adapt the sound to the space.

Whether you’re listening to jazz in the den or powering the backyard with a playlist during a get-together, the amplifier manages it all without compromise.

‍

‍

Quiet Strength, Seamless Integration

While the technical performance is outstanding, it’s the seamless integration that makes this amp homeowner-friendly. You don’t need to touch a rack of equipment every time you want to switch rooms or sources. Instead, everything works behind the scenes. It’s compatible with popular home automation systems like Control4, Crestron, and Savant—so if your home already runs on one of these, the M6800D fits right in.
